summary: This document outlines the usability evaluation protocol for KeepMeCompany's AI phone agent system, detailing intended users such as patients and receptionists within medical practices. It specifies training requirements, support materials like IFUs and security guides, and emphasizes GDPR compliance and NHS data standards. The protocol defines user testing methods to capture performance on hazard-related use scenarios.
